projects.title: Chamber of Commerce Website

projects.description: Real-time weather application fetching data from a weather API with responsive design and local storage.

projects.description: Interactive movie database with search functionality, detailed movie information, and sorting capabilities.

projects.title: Task Management App

projects.title: Portfolio Website

projects.title: Travel Destination Guide

projects.title: Music Player App
